title: Pouteria euphlebia
taxonomy: Pouteria euphlebia is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae. This plant belongs to the genus Pouteria, which includes various species of trees and shrubs. The Sapotaceae family is a group of flowering plants commonly known as the sapote family. Pouteria euphlebia is a tropical species native to Central and South America. It is a member of the order Ericales, which includes a wide range of flowering plant families.
uses: Pouteria euphlebia is a plant species known for its potential medicinal uses. Traditionally, the plant has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues.
